zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna d'Arsley於1069年出生在英國林可爾史爾林肯時，她的父親Robert d'Arsely25歲，母親wife Robert d'Arseley25歲。她於1088年與Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德錫頓 德拉瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德錫頓 德拉瓦爾。

zh-hans.Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德錫頓 德拉瓦爾
zh-hans.Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, England,: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德錫頓 德拉瓦爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna d'Arsley于1069年出生在英国林可爾史爾林肯时，她的父亲Robert d'Arsely25岁，母亲wife Robert d'Arseley25岁。她于1088年与Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德錫頓 德拉瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德錫頓 德拉瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dearsley
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Derisley Farm in Woodditton (Cambs).

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna d'Arsley was born in 1069, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Robert d'Arsely, was 25 and her mother, wife Robert d'Arseley, was 25. She married Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton in 1088, in Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna d'Arsley est née en 1069, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert d'Arsely, avait 25 ans et sa mère, wife Robert d'Arseley, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton en 1088, à Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée à Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna d'Arsley 1069 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert d'Arsely 25 und ihre Mutter wife Robert d'Arseley 25. Sie hat 1088 in Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb in Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna d'Arsley è nata il nel 1069 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Robert d'Arsely, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, wife Robert d'Arseley, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton nel 1088, nel Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna d'Arsleyが1069年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父Robert d'Arselyは25歳，母wife Robert d'Arseleyは25歳であった。1088年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドセアトン デラヴァルでRobert DeLaval Lord of Seatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドセアトン デラヴァルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna d'Arsley(이)가 1069년 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert d'Arsely(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 wife Robert d'Arseley(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1088년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 시턴 데라발에서 Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 시턴 데라발에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna d'Arsley nasceu em 1069, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert d'Arsely, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, wife Robert d'Arseley, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton em 1088, em Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna d'Arsley родилась в 1069 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert d'Arsely было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали wife Robert d'Arseley, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton в 1088 г. в местности ситон делаваль, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности ситон делаваль, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.
